content.full_text:
March 23, 1981

Barbara Lancaster  
Governmental Affairs  
Crocker Bank  
One Montgomery Street, 2d Floor  
San Francisco 94104

Dear Barbara:

This is to confirm our recent telephone conversations concerning the filing of campaign statements by Crocker Bank's federal PAC, CIVIC.

I advised you that CIVIC should file campaign statements for the years 1977, 1978, 1979, and 1980, in addition to the statement you are currently preparing for 1981. The statements may be prepared on an annual basis, that is, one statement may be prepared covering each calendar year. It will be necessary for you to itemize contributions of $50 or more for the years 1977 and 1978, to comply with the statutory requirements for those years. For the years 1979 and 1980, you should use the current threshold for itemization of $100 or more per contributor.

Prior to 1981, committee campaign statements were required to be filed in the jurisdiction of the recipient of the contribution or expenditure. (See page 9 of the 1980 Information Manual to determine where CIVIC's campaign statements should be filed.) Campaign statements which report contributions to state legislators should be filed (in addition to the standard places) with the clerk of the largest county by population of all the legislators contributed to during the period covered. (You do not need to file copies in all the counties which include the election districts of all the legislators contributed to.) In the case of contributions made to local candidates, a copy must also be filed in the local jurisdiction.

As I indicated to you on the telephone, you should prepare a transmittal letter to the Secretary of State when you file the campaign statements and include an explanation

Barbara Lancaster  
March 23, 1981  
Page Two

for the late filings, along with a request for waiver of fines, signed under penalty of perjury. A copy of the letter to the Secretary of State should be sent to each filing officer who will be receiving copies of the statements.

Enclosed are Information Manuals and campaign statements for the years 1977, 1978, 1979 and 1980.

Give me a call if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Jeanne Pritchard  
Political Reform Consultant
